title.rendered: Linda Ronstadt, Emmylou Harris, and Neil Young: Across the Border

content.rendered:
This cover of “Across the Border” combines not just two but three great voices: Emmylou Harris, Linda Ronstadt, and Neil Young (who hangs out on backing vocals but contributes a prominent harmonica).

From Linda and Emmylou’s 1999 album of duets, Western Wall: The  Tucson Sessions, this is “Across the Border.”

 

Even though Emmylou has covered Bruce enough times to make for a mini-blog by itself, this particular track deserves more listens. It’s no wonder Bruce invited Emmylou to sing it with him at Giants Stadium in 2003.

© August 29, 2018

excerpt.rendered: Three great voices blend lovingly in this gorgeous arrangement of “Across the Border.”

jetpack-related-posts.title: Willie Nelson and Emmylou Harris: Dry Lightning
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Willie Nelson and Emmylou Harris hit a home run with their world-weary take on "Dry Lightning."

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Wainright Family, Emmylou Harris, Brandi Carlile, and more: Hungry Heart
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: In February 2017, the Cayamo festival-at-sea featured some terrific team-ups. Here's one of them: "Hungry Heart" covered by the Wainright family, Emmylou Harris, Brandi Carlile, and more.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Across the Border
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: A salve for troubled times, Bruce's sublime "Across the Border" reminds us of the power and necessity of hope.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Spanish Dancer
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: During a week of holiday shows in 2001, Patti Scialfa performed her beautiful 1993 ballad with her husband backing her on guitar.

jetpack-related-posts.title: October 28
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Bruce's Bridge School Benefit sequel, the E Street Band's first-ever show, the DVD release that never was, and more--all from this date.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me: Satan’s Jeweled Crown
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: In the spring of 1993, Bruce leaned further into his new band's strengths with their gorgeous cover of a country-gospel classic.
